## **🎬 CASTING CALL – PAID ROLES (£550 Each)**

📍 **London (On-Set Shoot)**

📅 **Shoot Date: 17th March**

We’re casting for three paid roles for **HelloFresh** and **Green Chef**.

All roles are **£550**.

Talent must be available to shoot **in London on 17th March**.

Please read the full brief carefully before applying.

**🥗 HelloFresh – Single Mum**

**Female | 30–35**

**Fee: £550**

Looking for:
* Warm, relatable, modern energy
* Bright, likeable personality
* Natural on camera
* **Must be a parent**

This role requires genuine “real-life” family moments and comfort featuring your child(ren) in natural home footage.

**🥘 HelloFresh – Dad**

**Male | Mid-30s**

**Fee: £550**

Looking for:
* Calm, dependable, trustworthy presence
* Understated confidence
* Natural delivery
* **Must be a parent**

This role includes natural home/lifestyle footage with children.

**💪 Green Chef – Gym Guy / PT**

**Male | Mid-30s**

**Fee: £550**

Looking for:
* Credible personal trainer presence
* Grounded, knowledgeable delivery
* Strong on-camera authority
* **Must have active gym access**

Real gym environment required for pre-shoot footage.

## **🎥 B-ROLL REQUIREMENTS (IMPORTANT – ALL TALENT)**

All selected talent must supply lifestyle B-roll to support the edit.

**Pre-Shoot B-Roll (Required):**
* Filmed before shoot day
* Sent in advance
* Maximum 2 hours filming
* Shot list will be provided
* Natural, real-life footage only
* 
**👶 HelloFresh Talent – Children in B-Roll**

* Must be comfortable featuring children in pre-shoot B-roll
* Natural home/lifestyle moments only
* Minor release documentation will be provided if required
## **📌 How to Apply**

Please apply via this form only:

👉 https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScdiH6_ZP7I1xq0OHy6-_jFzGDt2w7oIRwRptlujEUXjLH6Uw/viewform?usp=header

Applications via DM or comments will not be considered.

items.text:
CASTING CALL – VOICE OVER ARTIST (MALE, US ACCENT)
We are seeking a male voice artist with an authentic American accent for a powerful and sensitive documentary exploring domestic violence, produced in collaboration with The Purple Project.

The role involves reading a series of poems written by survivors. The performance requires emotional intelligence, and the ability to deliver deeply personal material with authenticity and respect.

Details:

Male voice, natural US accent

Recording in London

Less than half a day’s work

Unpaid (charity collaboration)

This is an opportunity to contribute to an important project amplifying survivor voices and supporting meaningful change.

If interested, please get in touch.

topComments.text: Please let me know how to proceed forward or contact

items.text:
🎬 SUCHE Ü50 MANN ALS DOKTOR FÜR MUSIKVIDEO (BERLIN) 🎬
Für einen Musikvideodreh in Berlin suche ich einen aufgeschlossenen Mann Ü50, der die Rolle eines Doktors übernimmt.
📅 Datum: 25.01.2026
⏱ Dauer: ca. 4–5 Stunden
📍 Ort: Berlin
🩺 Zur Rolle / Story:
Die Storyline des Musikvideos dreht sich um eine große Schönheits-OP der Künstlerin.
Der gesuchte Mann spielt den Doktor, gemeinsam mit einer bekannten Influencerin, die die Krankenschwester verkörpert.
🎶 Projekt:
– Musikvideo
– zusätzlicher Content für TikTok & Social Media
🌈 WICHTIG:
Die Künstlerin ist trans.
Daher ist es unbedingt notwendig, dass du weltoffen, respektvoll bist und kein Problem mit queeren Menschen hast.
💸 Budget:
Leider kein Honorar möglich.
Dafür:
– Credits
– Verpflegung
– ein kreatives, positives Set
– Reichweite durch Social Media Content
👤 Voraussetzungen:
– Ü50
– offen, sympathisch, zuverlässig
– keine Schauspielerfahrung nötig
📩 Interesse?
Dann melde dich direkt hier per Nachricht
oder auf Instagram:
👉 https://www.instagram.com/echtjetztkimberly
Freue mich sehr über Nachrichten & Weiterempfehlungen 💖✨

items.text:
Schauspieler / Darsteller für Produktplatzierung gesucht 🎬
Hallo zusammen,

ich suche Männer oder Frauen (bevorzugt 35–45+) für eine Produktplatzierung im Bereich Gesundheit & Wohlbefinden.

Es geht um ein Produkt zur Anwendung bei Nacken- und Rückenschmerzen sowie allgemeinen Beschwerden im Oberkörper.

 • Natürlich, ruhig, alltagstauglich

 •     Kein Studio, Authentizität steht im Vordergrund.

 • Nutzung des Materials für    Werbeanzeigen (Social Media Ads)

 • Kameraerfahrung von Vorteil, aber kein Muss

 • Standort egal 🌍

Bei Interesse bitte Privatnachricht mit kurzen Infos zu dir (gerne mit Referenzen).

topComments.text: Hallo! Ich habe im Jänner bei euch einen Vertrag für diese Content Videos unterschrieben und ihr meldet euch aber nicht mehr. Ich habe kein Massage Kissen erhalten, keine Sendungsnummer, keine Sendungsmethode. Keine Antwort mehr auf Messenger wo ich Vertrag unterschrieb. Ich habe euch 2 E-Mails geschickt und und keine Antwort von euch bekommen. Hätte ich diese Fotos und Videos gerne gemacht. Habt ihr mich vergessen? Tina Christina Krabath Schauspielerin

items.text:
🎬 Schauspielerin (w, 20–30) für Straßenumfragen in München gesucht 🎬
Für ein innovatives Produkt im Straßenbau suchen wir eine attraktive, Schauspielerin (20–30 Jahre) aus München und Umgebung, die extrovertiert ist und aktiv auf Menschen zugehen kann.

📍 Aufgabe:

Du führst für unser Produkt Straßenumfragen durch und sprichst dabei gezielt Passanten an.

👉 Offene, kommunikative Art ist absolut entscheidend!

🕒 Dauer: 1 Tag

💰 Budget: 500 €

✅ Anforderungen:

 • Schauspielerfahrung oder starke Kamera-Präsenz

 • Sehr kontaktfreudig & selbstbewusst

 • Keine Scheu, fremde Menschen auf der Straße anzusprechen

 • Zuverlässig & professionell

📩 Bewerbung:

Bitte sende ein kurzes Referenz- oder Vorstellungsvideo

und schreibe mir direkt per WhatsApp: 015771082825

items.text:
🚨 **MODEL CALL: Food & Beverage Lifestyle COLLAB | MARCH 1ST (Burbank)** 🚨

🕟 Evening Session: 4:30 PM – 5:30 PM

📍 Location: Burbank, CA

We’re casting **male models** for a Food & Beverage lifestyle collaboration happening this Sunday, March 1st.

This is an **unpaid collaboration**, and we want to be clear about that upfront. Our community is centered around intentionally creating opportunities that help talent build strong portfolios, gain on-set experience, and connect with real creatives — including producers and crew already attached to upcoming projects.

Think of this shoot as an **introduction into what’s possible** when you’re working within a creative community that actively supports and develops its talent. 

✨ We are casting two distinct roles (first come, first serve):

1️⃣ **Outdoor Worker Type**

Think high-visibility vest, work boots, carpenter pants or utility-style wear.

Second and third looks should be cozy, comfortable basics (hoodie, knit, simple tee) for indoor lifestyle transitions.

2️⃣ **Biker / Heavy Commuter Type**

Think moto or commuter vibe — leather or denim jacket, helmet or gloves as props.

Additional looks should be relaxed, cozy wear (sweatshirt and a different color basic tee for variation).

If you’re interested and available:

• Comment which type you can realistically come dressed as

• Be ready to complete our application once we message you

• Serious inquiries only — we’re moving quickly

This is first come, first serve.

items.text:
**Castingaufruf für studentischen Kurzfilm (Tübinale)**

Meine studentische Filmgruppe sucht Darsteller*innen für einen ca. 6-minütigen Kurzfilm, der im Rahmen der Tübinale entsteht. Gedreht wird in der Fildergegend nahe Stuttgart. Der genaue Drehzeitraum wird noch bekannt gegeben.

**Logline:**
Als eine junge Frau beginnt, ihre Beziehung mit einem anderen Paar zu vergleichen, verliert sie den Blick für die Liebe, die direkt vor ihr steht.

**Gesuchte Rollen (alle ca. 19–25 Jahre):**

**Weibliche Hauptrolle**
Junge Frau in ihrer ersten ernsthaften Beziehung. Unsicher, emotional offen, stark von äußeren Erwartungen und Vergleichen beeinflusst. Die Rolle erfordert ein sensibles Spiel innerer Konflikte und leiser emotionaler Veränderungen.

**Männliche Hauptrolle**
Ihr Freund. Bodenständig, ruhig und bemüht. Er liebt ehrlich, gerät aber zunehmend unter Druck, weil er den Erwartungen seiner Partnerin nicht gerecht werden kann. Subtiles, zurückgenommenes Spiel ist wichtig.

**Weibliche Nebenrolle**
Junge Frau mit perfekter Außenwirkung. Kontrolliert und diszipliniert, privat jedoch angespannt. Die Rolle lebt vom Kontrast zwischen äußerer Kontrolle und innerer Unsicherheit.

**Männliche Nebenrolle**
Charismatisch, dominant, stark auf Außenwirkung bedacht. Kontrollierend und schnell reizbar. Muss zwischen Charme und unterschwelliger Bedrohlichkeit wechseln können.

Schauspielerfahrung ist willkommen, aber keine Voraussetzung. Wichtig sind Verlässlichkeit, Lust auf Spielen und Interesse an einem emotionalen, beziehungszentrierten Stoff.
Bei Interesse einfach eine Nachricht schreiben, dann schicken wir weitere Infos und das Drehbuch.

Februar genauere genauereInfosnach Infos nach Casting Casting Call: 2 Männer (19-25) 2 Frauen (19-25) für einen Kurzfilm die Tübinale (Schauspielerfahrung: nicht unbedingt) Umgebung: Fildergegend (nähe Stuttgart) für Schickt uns gerne Fotos von euch ohne Vergütung, aber mit Verpflegung Drehbuch Drehbuchnac nach Kontaktaufnahme bjoernalisminfoagmail.com Für mehr Information schreibt uns entweder über die angegebene Email oder schreibt uns eine DM per Insta ajasminninette'

items.text:
**KORTFILM**

*VI SØGER EN KVINDE OG EN MAND I ALDEREN 19 TIL 25 ÅR TIL OPTAGELSER DEN 11. OG 12. APRIL 2026*

Vi kommer fra Den Danske Ungdomsfilmskole (Station Next Aarhus), hvor vi skal i gang med vores hovedproduktion. Det drejer sig om en komediekortfilm, som optages i foråret 2026.

Filmen handler om en mand, der forsøger at redde sit forhold, efter han har glemt at købe en årsdagsgave til sin kæreste.

Du bedes sende et selftape ud fra instruktionerne under den rolle, du søger. Manuskriptet sendes ved henvendelse.

Selftape behøver ikke være teknisk avanceret. En simpel optagelse på telefon er helt fint.

**Løn:**

Rollerne er ulønnede, men transport og forplejning dækkes.

**Optagelser:**

Optagedagene er planlagt som heldagsproduktioner begge dage.
Optagelserne finder sted i Aarhus og omegn.

**Roller:**

**Lukas:**

Alder 19 til 25 år
Lukas er en ynkelig mand, der ofte hopper over, hvor gærdet er lavest, men som vil gøre alt for at redde sit forhold.
I dit selftape skal du tage udgangspunkt i replik 35 samt replik 9 til 14.

**Sofie:**

Alder 19 til 25 år
Sofie er realistisk og tror på, at et forhold kræver tid og energi.
I dit selftape skal du tage udgangspunkt i replik 37 og ned til slutningen.

**Deadline:**

Deadline for selftape er 28. februar 2026.
Vi afholder fysisk casting den 7. marts 2026.

**Ansøgning:**

Ansøgningen sendes til Nikoline på
**nfischermikkelsen@gmail.com**

items.text:
*SUBMISSIONS CLOSED*

Thank you so much to everyone who has reached out and shown interest in Liked. I’ve been genuinely overwhelmed by the response and I’m so grateful for the time and effort people have put into their submissions.

As interviews are taking place tomorrow, I’ve now closed submissions and won’t be able to review any further applications.

Thank you again for your support, it truly means a lot 🤍

Hi everyone! I’m making a film for my final year project for uni! It’s a paid project filming in Liverpool! In-person auditions are this Monday (2nd March) at 13:00.

items.text:
Vicky Boone Casting is looking for Latino men ages 30-50 for a World Cup Academy Sports commercial!

We are looking for:

[SOCCER FAN] Male, 30-50, Latino. Real looks/Dad vibes. Mustache is a plus, but not required. OCP.

Project: Academy Sports + Outdoors
Agency: McGarrah Jessee
Production Company: The Bear
Project Type: Social Media Campaign
Union Status: Non-Union
Project Rate: $500/day
Fitting Rate: $50/hour (if applicable)
Fitting Date(s): March 23 or March 24 (TBD)
Shoot Date(s): March 26 - March 30, 2026 (will likely shoot 1-2 day within this range)
Shoot Location: Austin, TX (and surrounding area). Must work local to Austin.
Term: 3 months from first use date for video and perpetual for stills
—

If you are a fit and interested in submitting, please submit ASAP to submissions@vickyboonecasting.com by sending the following info:

*Name
*City you live in
*Contact Number
*Two recent photos
*Confirm you are avail for all the dates mentioned or list conflicts (3/23-3/24 and 3/26-3/30)
*Please use the subject line “SOCCER FAN”

Use: Video usage covers use in social media for 3 months from first air date, includes unlimited edits, lifts, and versions now known or hereafter developed. Usage also covers use of stills for use in: all digital media (including but not limited to: websites, emails, paid/organic social, banners, etc.), in-stores, collateral material, and OOH. Still usage is perpetual

We look forward to your submissions!

[We do not give permission to other casting sites to repost this casting call]

– Team VBC

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'CASTING LATINO MEN AGES 30-50 WITH DAD LOOKS FOR SPORTS BRAND COMMERCIAL DETAILS IN CAPTION'

message.text:
Thank you Radio Metroplex for showing Dallas love and having Vani Vargas on your show to talk about "The Last Drive".

What an amazing spotlight and opportunity. We thank you from the bottom of our hearts!! 

See you on the Red Carpet!! 

The Last Drive
A Short Film by Vani Vargas
March 8 2026 7pm

Here's your chance to win 2 tickets!! Simply, Like and share this post to be entered in the giveaway!! 

Winner to be announced 2/28/26.

Please visit Eventbrite for Tickets, Sponsorship or Movie Trailer Promotion opportunities. 

🧡Links in the comments🧡

items.text:
Poszukiwana Aktorka x2 ❤
1. Kobieta, wiek 26+ (lub wyglądająca poważniej), rola RECEPCJONISTKI, konkretna, ostra babka bez uśmiechu, około 2h pracy.
2. Kobieta, wiek 18+ , młoda, energiczna, miła, ładna, sympatyczna, rola SZCZĘŚLIWEJ DZIEWCZYNY, z uśmiechem przyklejonym na twarzy, około 5h pracy.

Co tworzymy : Klip, teledysk
Kiedy : Wstępnie 8 lub 15 marca 2026
Gdzie : Warszawa
Płacimy : TAK :) 

Zgłoszenia tylko i wyłącznie przez prywatną wiadomość wraz ze zdjęciem/filmem, portfolio.

Amatorki mile widziane!
Miłego i zapraszam do współpracy, BEGAN :)

items.text:
AKTOR (40-60l.) POSZUKIWANY
Witam!! Do etiudy operatorskiej Łódzkiej Szkoły Filmowej poszukujemy aktora do roli ojca.

Film utrzymany w stylistyce cyberpunkowej. Opowiada historię ojca, który samotnie wychowuje swojego syna, w międzyczasie prowadząc poszukiwania jego matki.

● Zarost mile widziany

● Szukamy oryginalnych twarzy

● W miarę wysportowana sylwetka również na plus (jednak nie typ kulturysty! zdrowa sylwetka)

🕰 Termin: 18-20.03.2026

🌐 Miejsce: Łódź i okolice

🏛 Zapewniamy zwrot za dojazd oraz zakwaterowanie na czas planu, jednak jest to ogłoszenie non-profit!

Proszę o podesłanie aktualnych zdjęć, demo aktorskiego oraz informacji o aktualnym miejscu zamieszkania.

martyna.produkcja@o2.pl

items.text:
🎬 CASTING CALL — JEFFERSON DAVIS (MILES MORALES’S FATHER) 🎬

We are casting the role of Jefferson Davis for our upcoming Spider-Man fan project. This is a major supporting role portraying a dedicated father, respected police officer, and moral anchor in Miles’s life. We are seeking an actor who can embody strength, authority, warmth, and emotional depth.

⭐ CHARACTER DESCRIPTION (COMIC-ACCURATE LOOK REQUIRED)
• Ethnicity: Black / African American
• Age Range: 40s to 50s (appearance)
• Height: Average to above average
• Build: Average to solid, strong presence
• Hair: Shaved head / bald
• Facial Hair: Full dark beard (well-maintained)
• Eyes: Brown
• Wardrobe Style: Textured olive-green or brown cardigan-style jacket with large brown buttons worn over a white collared shirt
• Overall Presence: Commanding, grounded, protective, disciplined, and deeply caring

🎭 PERFORMANCE REQUIREMENTS
• Strong dramatic acting ability
• Convincing portrayal of a principled father and law enforcement officer
• Natural authority with emotional range
• Comfortable with dialogue-heavy and heartfelt scenes

📍 PRODUCTION DETAILS
• Project Type: Spider-Man fan film
• Filming Location: [South Ockendon Essex]
• Shooting Dates: [5th March 2026 time 1:00pm]
• Compensation: [Paid ] via PayPal or bank transfer ￼

📩 HOW TO AUDITION
Send the following:
• Headshot and full-body photo
• Acting reel or recent self-tape

⭐ CHARACTER DESCRIPTION (COMIC-ACCURATE LOOK REQUIRED)
• Ethnicity: Black / African American
• Age Range: 40s to 50s (appearance)

• Build: Average to solid, strong presence
• Hair: Shaved head / bald
• Facial Hair: Full dark beard (well-maintained)
• Eyes: Brown
• Wardrobe Style: Textured olive-green or brown cardigan-style jacket with large brown buttons worn over a white collared shirt

🎭 PERFORMANCE REQUIREMENTS
• Strong dramatic acting ability
• Convincing portrayal of a principled father and law enforcement officer
• Natural authority with emotional range

📍 PRODUCTION DETAILS

items.text:
# CASTING CALL FOR A SFU student film

non-union. unpaid.

**Project Synopsis**

The film is eerie and has supernatural elements. ALEX experiences visions of an eerie field with a nearing FIGURE while going about their day. We follow as this other world steep into theirs. 

~ ACTING EXPERIENCE IS NOT REQUIRED.

The two characters only share ~2 scenes together.

ALEX: (18-25yo) A little neurotic. An overthinker. The visions are affecting the quality of life as they keep losing time. Lives alone and works contract financial jobs from home. Very little dialogue. There is one scene where ALEX changes from work clothes to pajamas. Discussion will happen before set and everything will be adjusted to your comfort level!

FIGURE: (ageless) must be comfortable wearing some type of mask or face covering. A pivotal point in the story. We will never see a face clearly. Non-speaking but a sinister presence. 

SHOOT DAY: March 7th and 8th

7th: outside (with easy access to house), later night. Langley. If there is any concerns regarding transportation we can arrange help for you!

8th: Burnaby area, day.

Please email your headshot, availability to have meeting & demo reel (if you have one) to mgjohnson.film@gmail.com

items.text:
CASTING – 2 GŁÓWNE ROLE DO PROJEKTU REKLAMOWEGO | WARSZAWA
Do komercyjnej sesji zdjęciowej szukamy dwóch głównych bohaterów.

Projekt płatny (wynagrodzenie + wykup praw).

Prawa bezterminowe, cały świat.

Główne rynki: USA i Kanada.

📅 Termin zdjęć: 20 marca.

⸻

ROLA 1: FOTOGRAF (kobieta)

33–35 lat. Wygląda młodo, ale ma w sobie doświadczenie, spokój i pewność siebie.

Szukamy naturalnej urody, z wyraźnym charakterem. Bardzo zależy nam na typie niesłowiańskim, najlepiej o zagranicznej, nietypowo europejskiej urodzie – może być etniczność mieszana. Nie szukamy klasycznego, słowiańskiego typu (blond/jasny brąz + niebieskie oczy).

Wyraźnie afroamerykański typ urody – nie w tym projekcie.

Mile widziana różnorodność, ale kluczowa jest charyzma, silna obecność przed kamerą i autentyczność (np. naturalnie kręcone rude włosy będą atutem).

Dowolna sylwetka.

⸻

ROLA 2: BARISTA (mężczyzna)

20+. Ciemne włosy (mogą być nieco dłuższe), broda, vibe lekko hipsterski.

Tatuaże mile widziane.

Ciemniejsza karnacja będzie atutem.

Również zależy nam na naturalności i charakterystycznej, nieoczywistej urodzie.

⸻

Ważne: Kandydaci nie mogą mieć silnej obecności na dużych platformach stockowych ani niedawnych współprac reklamowych z oprogramowaniem do edycji zdjęć czy narzędziami dla fotografów.

⸻

Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać w wiadomości prywatnej:

– wiek

– numer telefonu

– wymiary

– aktualne zdjęcia

– video-wizytówka

Będziemy wdzięczni za udostępnienia 💛

items.text: What an absolutely fabulous day yesterday at the WeAudition.com/ Actors Pro Expo launching our new talent agency Magnificent Talent and attending multiple networking events organised by the two lovely founders of vshowcards.com Darren Tassell and Alex Reece. # *****CASTING CALL (SMALL PAY, BELFAST)*****

# **BLACK DOG**

*A troubled vigilante spends his nights patrolling the city streets and fighting criminals, all the while being haunted by visions of a black dog that push him towards self-destruction.*

**Short film** casting **four male supporting actors** to play a rag-tag gang of criminals for a pivotal **fight sequence** and recurring presence in the film.

***BIGMAN*** (40s to 50s)

The de facto leader. Calm, experienced, pragmatic. Carries authority within the group.

***GRUMBLE*** (20s to 40s)

Practical. Complains often, but gets the job done. Quick temper.

***LADYKILLER*** (20s to 30s)

Flashier, image-conscious, slightly cocky. Reacts emotionally when things turn violent.

***BABYFACE*** (20s to 30s)

Youngest energy of the group. Alert, anxious, reactive. Acts as a lookout during operations.

# **Fight scene required**
* All roles involve a choreographed, physical fight scene with the lead actor.
* Actors must be comfortable with staged violence, falling to the ground and staged injuries.
* Any experience in stage combat, stunt work, boxing, wrestling or physical theatre is welcome but not essential.
* All combat will be thoroughly rehearsed and choreographed to ensure on-set safety.

# **Production details**
* QUB film Master’s dissertation project.
* Small, token payment included.
* Travel covered and catering provided.
* **All experience levels welcome**.
* **Ages are flexible**.
* Filming in Belfast across several nights in late March/early April.

Contact us at:
# **daniel-bingham@hotmail.co.uk**

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text

topComments.text: Please make sure your pay is compliant with the National Minimum Wage Act 1998.

items.text:
Your weekly international comedy meetup in the heart of Warsaw ❣️🤍
Live comedy. Real presence. Shared space.

We host a weekly English-language comedy night where people come together to laugh, listen, and connect in the same room.

Stand-up, improv, and occasional surprises, always live, always shaped by the people who show up.

It’s not about being the biggest or loudest show in town.
It’s about creating a space where comedy feels human again.
Each night is a little different.
Some shows lean more toward stand-up, others toward improv or playful experimentation. Sometimes something unexpected sneaks in. Nothing is repeated exactly the same way twice.

You’ll see a mix of bold local and international comedians, first-timers taking their first five minutes on stage, and more experienced performers trying new material in front of a real audience.

We’re not chasing trends.
We’re simply building something consistent, welcoming, and alive.
Hosted by Miguel Ferreira
A Brazilian comedian based in Warsaw, curious about people, culture, and what happens when strangers laugh together.

Why this exists
Because people miss being in rooms.
Because shared laughter still works.
Because live moments feel different when you’re actually there.
This isn’t background entertainment.
It’s something you’re part of.
Schedule
Happy Hour & Meet & Greet: 7:00 PM
Show starts: 8:00 PM
Location
Południk Zero
Wilcza 25, Warsaw
15 minutes from Pałac Kultury

🎟 Tickets:
https://fienta.com/2-0-comedy-show2-154404

🐾 Well-behaved pets are welcome.
🎤 Thinking about performing?

Each show keeps one spot open for a first-time performer.
Five minutes. One mic. A real audience.
📍 Impact Warsaw
Instagram: @impactwarsaw, @miguelatcomedy
Events: impactwarsaw.com/events
Inner Circle: https://t.me/+xJpuxiG5Au8xMmZk
If you’re curious, you’re welcome.
If you need a break from scrolling, come sit with us.
Just show up and see what happens.

**TITLE**: The Jackal’s Office

**GENRE**: Drama

**LOGLINE**: Set in a bureaucratic afterlife, The Jackal’s Office is a take on the weighing of the heart ceremony with the Egyptian god, Anubis.

**ROLES**:

**JACK**- M, 20s-40s. Tailored, forthright, weigher of hearts.

**MILO**- M, 20s. Gruff, self-regarding, recently deceased.

**Production Company**: Poison Ink Productions, Dir. Aiden Villarreal

**Production Type**: Short Film

**Contact Information**: poisoninkproductions@gmail.com

**Run Time**: Short

**Compensation**: Unpaid. Reel footage, meals, and snacks provided.

**Union Status**: Non-Union

**Audition Information**: Please submit through QR code, or through this link: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdF5cfG3jvJ2byKe6belFQlGRx1zm2Qa88__m9tFAB8DVT4RQ/viewform

Self tape auditions due by the evening of Sunday, March 1st.

Sides are attached to link above.

**Shooting Schedule**: March 14th &15th

**Filming Location**: Denver

URGENT Casting Call for 5 Italian Nonnas – PAID 1-Day Coffee Commercial in LA
Hi everyone! We’re urgently looking to cast five older women to play Italian nonnas in a documentary-style commercial for a franchise coffee brand.

This is a sweet, natural, conversational role — NO FORMAL ACTING EXPERIENCE NEEDED.

📍 Location: Los Angeles County
📅 Shoot Date: Thursday, March 5, 2026
⏰ Approx. 12-hour day, call time TBD
💵 Paid gig - $300+, Travel WILL be covered
🍽 Food will be provided on set

What we’re looking for:
- Women 60 years or older
- Comfortable speaking Italian, you do NOT need to be fluent
- Just able to pronounce Italian clearly and read a few short lines

If you’re interested (or know someone who would be perfect!), please email:

📩 connect@intrasithcollective.com

Including:
-A recent photo of yourself that shows you from head to toe
-Your current hometown (For travel considerations)
-A contact phone number

Please reach out ASAP if you’re interested!

Thank you so much

items.text:
Rytmigo går digitalt! Derfor tilbyder jeg lønnede jobs til børn der kan synge og/eller danse. Det mangler jeg:

Børn der kan synge mellem 8 - 12 år
Børn der kan danse mellem 9 - 17 år

I den forbindelse afholder jeg audition i Aalborg lørdag d. 10 Januar fra 13 - 16. Udover mig, vil der være en repræsentant fra Lille Label, som er en del af Sony. Lokationen i Aalborg sender jeg i en pm, når vi har aftalt noget endeligt. Mere info gives under audition. 

Så hvis du kender et barn der kunne tænke sig verdens fedeste fritidsjob, så send mig en mail på thomas@rytmigo.dk eller send en pb her på facebook, med lyd eller levende billeder af sang eller dans. Så aftaler vi videre derfra.  

Fremtidig indspilning af sang og video vil foregå fast i Aalborg, hovedsageligt i weekender eller ferier. Kan I ikke det, så er der ingen grund til at sende mig noget, eller melde jer til.  

Mvh
Thomas / Rytmigo

topComments.text: Mon ikke du mener en anden mdr. end Januar? 😊

**AUDITION TIL “EN VERDEN AF LIV” – af Mai Wied**

Vi inviterer til audition på Mai Wieds teatermusical *“En verden af liv”*, hvor vi bevæger os dybt ind i dyrenes univers. I foråret 2026 øver vi frem mod en vild, musikalsk og sanselig forestilling midt i naturen.

**Dato for audition:** 31. januar 2026
**Sted:** Djurslands Folkehøjskole, Drammelstrupvej 15, Tirstrup, 8400 Ebeltoft

Tilmeld dig her: https://www.djfh.dk/auditions/ 🌙

What's Mark Stinger's acting background?

Mark Stinger is a musician and actor from New Jersey. His acting credits include films like ¹ ²:
- Film:
    - Rocky Balboa: He played a role in this film, showcasing his versatility as an actor.
    - Creed 1 and 2: Mark Stinger was part of the cast in both films, further solidifying his acting career.
    - Silver Linings Playbook: He acted in this critically acclaimed film, demonstrating his range.
    - Glass: Mark Stinger was part of the cast, contributing to the film's success.
    - Law Abiding Citizen: He played a role in this thriller film.
    - 21 Bridges: Mark Stinger acted in this action-drama film.
    - The Nomads: He was part of the cast in this film.
    - The Lovely Bones: Mark Stinger had a role in this film.
    - The Happening: He acted in this film directed by M. Night Shyamalan.
    - Charlotte's Web: Mark Stinger played a role in this film.
    - Invincible: He was part of the cast.
    - Limitless: Mark Stinger acted in this science fiction thriller film.
    - The Answer Man: He had a role in this film.
    - Dispatches from Elsewhere: Mark Stinger acted in this TV series.
    - Servant: He played a role in this TV series, working with M. Night Shyamalan again.
- Other work: Mark Stinger has also been involved in the Blues Brothers tribute tour, showcasing his musical talents ¹ ³.

items.text:
URGENT Casting Call for 5 Italian Nonnas – PAID 1-Day Coffee Commercial in LA
Hi everyone! We’re urgently looking to cast five older women to play Italian nonnas in a documentary-style commercial for a franchise coffee brand.

This is a sweet, natural, conversational role — NO FORMAL ACTING EXPERIENCE NEEDED.

📍 Location: Los Angeles County
📅 Shoot Date: Thursday, March 5, 2026
⏰ Approx. 12-hour day, call time TBD
💵 Paid gig - $300+, Travel WILL be covered
🍽 Food will be provided on set

What we’re looking for:
- Women 60 years or older
- Comfortable speaking Italian, you do NOT need to be fluent
- Just able to pronounce Italian clearly and read a few short lines

If you’re interested (or know someone who would be perfect!), please email:

📩 connect@intrasithcollective.com

Including:
-A recent photo of yourself that shows you from head to toe
-Your current hometown (For travel considerations)
-A contact phone number

Please reach out ASAP if you’re interested!

Thank you so much

Have an awesome week and let me know if you have any questions.

sharedPost.text:
🎥 Montaż demo aktorskiego z konsultacją 

Potrzebujesz demo aktorskiego, które pokaże Twój talent aktorski i wszechstronność a jednocześnie będzie zgodne z aktualnymi wymogami reżyserów castingu? Chcesz dowiedzieć się jak pobierać materiały i jak tworzyć takie demo samemu w przyszłości w łatwy sposób oraz jak zwiększyć swoje szanse na konkretną role? Jeżeli tak to zapraszam do skorzystania z mojej usługi 🙂 

✅ dokładnie przejrzę Twoje aktorskie materiały, wybiorę najlepsze aktorsko sceny oraz różnorodne pod względem emocji i ról

✅ zmontuję demo zgodnie z aktualnymi wymogami reżyserów castingu uwzględniając również to, które sceny Ty uważasz za najlepsze 

✅ podczas konsultacji opowiem Ci o obecnych standardach montażu i doboru scen, dam dużo cennych rad abyś mogła / mógł w przyszłości montować demo samodzielnie 

✅ gotowe demo dostaniesz ode mnie maksymalnie w 2 dni od wysłania mi swoich materiałów

✅ przystępna cena 💵 szczegóły na priv 

Na zdjęciach załączam jedną z wiadomość od klienta po moim montażu 🔥💪 

Uwaga! Nie zajmuję się pobieraniem materiałów.

items.text:
Chcesz zostać aktorką/aktorem albo mieć więcej aktorskiej pracy ale nie wiesz co konkretnie zrobić? 🤔 Jeżeli tak oferuję: 
🎬mentoring aktorski 
🎬nagranie wizytówek w Warszawie
🎬montaż demo aktorskiego zgodnie z aktualnymi wymogami reżyserów obsady 

Szczegóły w opisie i na priv :)

sharedPost.text:
Chcesz zostać aktorką/aktorem albo mieć więcej aktorskiej pracy ale nie wiesz co konkretnie zrobić? 🤔 Jeżeli tak - zapraszam na konsultacje do mnie, nagranie wizytówek i montaż demo aktorskiego! 🎬🤩 Szczegóły w opisie! 

🎥 Mentoring aktorski 

Dla kogo? 

Dla każdego kto chce pracować jako aktor/aktorka na planach zdjęciowych. Zarówno dla tych bez doświadczenia, któryórzy nie wiedzą jak zacząć i co zrobić jak i dla tych co już pierwsze kroki mają za sobą ale chcieliby mieć więcej pracy i potrzebują rady w tym zakresie 🙂 

Na czym polega? 

Spotkanie ze mną 1:1 online, trwające godzinę. Opowiesz mi jakie zlecenia aktorskie Cię interesują - czyli Twój aktorski cel i według tego dobieramy odpowiedni plan działania. Jeżeli masz materiały aktorskie - to je omówimy i powiem co warto byłoby jeszcze do nich dodać lub jak je “podrasować”. Jeżeli nie masz to dowiesz się co i jak masz zrobić żeby je mieć 🙂 Powiem o moich poleceniach agencji aktorskich, jak samodzielnie i łatwo zrobić demo, jak nagrać i co powiedzieć w wizytówkach, jak samodzielnie szukać pracy, jak się wyceniać, na co uważać. I odpowiem na wszystkie inne Twoje pytania. Po spotkaniu otrzymasz ode mnie maila z planem działania i priorytetami do wykonania + materiałami pomocniczymi dot. materiałów aktorskich. 

🎥 Coaching aktorski z wizytówki + nagranie wizytówek w studio 

Na czym polega? 

✅ Tworzę tekst do wizytówek na podstawie informacji o Twoim doświadczeniu, pasjach, zainteresowaniach, który dostajesz przed nagraniem według castingowych wytycznych, który pokaże Twoje największe atuty

✅W studio nagrań nagrywamy 3-4 wizytówki:

🎬 do filmów i seriali 
🎬 do reklam w wersji dłuższej 
🎬 do reklam w wersji krótszej 
🎬 w języku obcym 
Ewentualnie możemy dograć wizytówkę modelingową 

✅ W trakcie nagrywania zadbam o Twoje rozluźnienie, dobrą atmosferę oraz zrobimy kilka ćwiczeń które pomogą pokazać na wizytówkach Twoją energię i błysk w oku 
oraz będę czuwać nad całym procesem

✅ Wizytówki nagramy według aktualnych standardów i wymogów castingowych 

✅ Dostaniesz zmontowane wizytówki gotowe do wysłania przez WeTransfer

🎥 Demo aktorskie 

montaż demo aktorskiego + konsultacja 

Na czym polega? 

✅ otrzymasz ode mnie demo aktorskie zmontowane zgodnie z obecnymi wymogami reżyserów castingu + podczas konsultacji wspólnie dobierzemy sceny, które się w nim znajdą oraz przedstawię Ci mój pomysł na ich kolejność 

Podczas konsultacji dowiesz się również:

✅ jak pobierać materiały do demo aktorskiego 
✅ jakie są obecne wymogi i standardy wzgledem aktorskiego demo 
✅ jakie sceny wybierać i w jakiej kolejności je zmontować  
✅ jak samemu w łatwy sposób przemontować demo pod konkretny casting 

Szczegóły priv

items.text:
**Mini serial wojenny 1940 – kobieta o blond włosach -  główny archeolog Ahnenerbe**

 

**Szukamy skarnu Templariuszy z 1307 roku!**

 

Nasza Gliwicka Grupa Pasjonatów **‘’Morskie opowieści’’** poszukuje kobiety do roli niemieckiej pani archeolog  w szukaniu historycznych artefaktów. Najlepiej jakby kandydatka miała **od 35 – 40 lat o blond włosach o szczupłej budowie ciała. **Wszystkie kwestie postaci będą mówione po niemiecku dla lepszego efektu filmu oraz kilka po francusku gdyż będzie scena kiedy archeolog tłumaczy stare dokumenty średniowieczne. Szukamy kogoś z Gliwic lub okolic: Zabrze, Katowice najdalej. Same zdjęcia będą realizowane na terenie Gliwic. **Na początku 2025** może będziemy realizować ten mini serial  oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej **‘’Ahnenerbe’’** która chce zdobyć słynny artefakt ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. **Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne.**

 

**Od maja 2026 planujemy realizacje zdjęc do tego **projektu. Będziemy realizować mini serial oparty o wątki grupy okultystycznej ’’**Ahnenerbe’**’ która chce zdobyć słynne artefakty ale w tym ktoś im chce przeszkadzać. Projekt będzie  się składać z 6 odcinków po 10/12 minut każdy. Będziemy też sukcesywnie dodawać inne ogłoszenia związane z tym projektem. Mile widziane zdjęcia aktualne. Na zdjęciu powyżej osoba będzie mieć podobny kostium.** **Umieszczone materiały są z naszej sesji.** Nie będzie to zlecenie płatne**

Od 01.04.25 założyliśmy swój kanał na portalu youtube z filmami z naszych planów żeby można było zobaczyć jak to u nas wygląda od kuchni. 

 

https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCE8KyfwpyFGzzwUDqdwy74g

 

Więcej informacji na Priv

** **

**Serial nie jest stworzony z sympatii do tej nazistowskiej organizacji lecz wynika to z samego scenariusza aby ukazał zbrodnie i sam fakt iż była w pełni zła. W produkcji znajdą się osoby, które będą chcieć walczyć i potępiać te wielkie zło jakim był nazizm. W oparciu o Dz.U.2017.0.2204 t.j. - Ustawa z dnia 6 czerwca 1997 r. - Kodeks karny,Art. 256 "Propagowanie faszyzmu lub innego ustroju totalitarnego lub nawoływanie domnienawiści", §3 - nie narusza prawa proponując przedmiot do celów historycznych lub kolekcjonerskich.**

🎬 **CASTING CALL – 2 FEMALE BACKGROUND ACTORS**

We are looking for **2 female background actors** (open ethnicity), **age 25–40**, to play **nurses working at an old age home** in a short scene for our feature film project.

This is a background role that helps bring authenticity and realism to the setting.

**Wardrobe:**
If you have your own **scrubs or apron**, that would be great! If not, no worries — we will arrange something suitable.

**Location:** Surrey City Library 

**Date:** Saturday, **28 February 2026**

**Time:** 10:00 AM – 11:30 AM

**Compensation:** Volunteer position
(Crafty/snacks will be provided.)

If interested, please send a brief introduction and recent photo to:
📩 **expressentryfilm@gmail.com**

Feel free to share with anyone who might be a good fit!

items.text:
ISO: Background Performers – March 2 – VOLUNTEER

Hi everyone!

We’re looking for background performers for a short film shooting on March 2nd. You’ll be playing club attendees and bystanders in a nightclub scene.

This is a self-funded passion project, and these are volunteer roles. It’s a great opportunity to gain on-set experience, connect with other creatives, and be part of an indie production. Meals and crafty will be provided.

If you’re available and interested, please DM me with your availability and a recent photo. Feel free to share with anyone who might want to join!

Additional information: 

Director: Brandon James Gilbert

Producer(s): Javier Porragas, Jacob Crawford 

DOP: Max Brey 

This is a Union Project, but your BG work will not be applicable to Union status.

items.text:
ISO: Casting for Chapman MFA Short 

**Project Title:** *Take a Little Time*

**Project Type:** Student Short Film 

**Union Status:** Non-Union

**Genre:** Coming of Age/ Musical Drama

**Length:** ~10 minutes

**Producer:** Kexin Tang

**Co-Written & Directed by:** Mackenzie Baumert

**Production Type:** Independent / Student

**Shoot Location:** [Los Angeles, CA]

**Shoot Dates:** [April 3-5,2026]

**Compensation:** Copy, meals, credit

We are committed to diverse, inclusive casting. For every role, please submit qualified performers, without regard to disability, gender, race and ethnicity, age, color, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity or any other basis prohibited by law.

SYNOPSIS:  AFTER A DISAPPOINTING AUDITION IN NEW YORK, A DRIVEN YOUNG PERFORMER RETURNS HOME TO TEXAS, WHERE RECONNECTING WITH HER MUSICIAN FATHER HELPS HER REDISCOVER HER VOICE - AND REDEFINE WHAT SUCCESS REALLY MEANS.

**DEAN GAIN **

**Male | 50s | Open Ethnicity | LEAD**

Melanie’s father. A warm, charismatic local musician with an easy sense of humor and deep emotional intelligence. When his daughter comes home, Dean battles his agency as her dad, whether he should push her towards picking up a guitar again and writing music like she used to love, or if he should stay quiet and allow her to discover her own voice. 

**Singing and guitar-playing REQUIRED. Please submit all instruments played. **

**JAMES **

**Male | 50s | Open Ethnicity | SUPPORTING**

Dean’s longtime music partner and close friend. Easygoing, warm, and quietly observant. James loves Dean like a brother and thus loves Melanie, he struggles to best support Melanie as she closes off, and properly support Dean as his friend. 

**Singing and guitar-playing preferred.**

**CASTING AGENT **

**Any Gender | 30s–50s | Open Ethnicity | DAY PLAYER**

Organized and observant individual that values efficiency and helping directors find the perfect cast. Struggles to feel empathetic towards those auditioning for them. 

**DIRECTOR **

**Any Gender | 30s–50s | Open Ethnicity | BACKGROUND**

Quiet, observant, and authoritative. Limited dialogue. Has a strong sense of their creative desires, and doesn’t care much about the emotions of those that walk in the room. 
**ACCOMPANIST**

**Any Gender | 30s–60s | Open Ethnicity | BACKGROUND**

A neutral, experienced presence in the audition room.
**Keyboard skills required.**

***EXTRAS ***

***BETWEEN THE AGES OF 20-30 for an audition scene.  (FEMALE IDENTIFYING) (3-4 TOTAL)***

***AND/OR 20-60s to play in a country bar scene. (ANY GENDER) (10-15 TOTAL)***

Please submit a headshot, resumé, and acting reel (and music sample of choice if specified for role) to [ketang@chapman.edu](mailto:ketang@chapman.edu) AND [baumert@chapman.edu](mailto:baumert@chapman.edu) by 03/10/2026. Self tape requests/zoom auditions will be requested after this date. Thanks!

sharedPost.text:
✨ CALL FOR VOLUNTEER PERFORMERS ✨

WOOM is back to work in association with the Adelaide Hunter Hoodless Homestead, and is seeking volunteer performers for Summer Milk, an evocative pre-recorded audio walk experience.

🌾 About the Project
Summer Milk invites audiences to step outside of time and journey through the Homestead alongside Jane Hamilton Hunter, reliving intimate memories of motherhood and the extraordinary woven into everyday life. This is not a linear biography, but a walk through memory — tender, reflective, and deeply human.

🎭 Performer Role
Performers will collaboratively devise physical scores of movement, gesture, and action (not dance) to embody these memories under the direction of Holly B Wood.

📍 Details

Rehearsals: Once weekly at the Homestead in St. George

Performances: May 16–17, 2026

Auditions: Saturday, March 7, 2026 | 11 AM–4 PM

Location: Adelaide Hunter Hoodless Homestead
359 Blue Lake Rd, St. George, ON

🔗 Book your audition:
https://calendar.app.google/B5cMjJQrXKhXeQz87

Can’t attend in person? Virtual auditions are available.
📧 Contact Stage Manager Jasmine Romany with questions or to book virtually: j.romany@hotmail.com

Come help us bring memory to life. 💫

#WOOMcollaborative #SummerMilk #CallForPerformers #KWArts #SiteSpecificPerformance AudioWalk VolunteerPerformers

items.text:
🎭 AUDITION I OSLO – ER DU MELLOM 14–20 ÅR?

Momentum Company søker skuespillere og dansere til forestillingen Dymphna – en sterk og aktuell danse- og teaterproduksjon med fokus på mental helse.

Vi ser etter deg som ønsker å stå på scenen og være en del av en meningsfull produksjon sammen med et dedikert kunstnerisk team.

✨ Hvem kan søke?
• Skuespillere og/eller dansere
• Spillealder 14–20 år

📍 Audition:
Onsdag 25. mars i Oslo
(Tidspunkt og eksakt adresse sendes til de som blir invitert.)

🎬 Om forestillingen
Dymphna utforsker temaer rundt mental helse og fortelles gjennom en kombinasjon av dans, monologer og fysisk scenearbeid.
Vi søker:
• 1 kvinnelig hovedrolle
• 2 mannlige hovedroller
• Ensemble (dansere og skuespillere)

Dette er en uhonorert produksjon, men gir verdifull sceneerfaring og tett samarbeid med et profesjonelt og engasjert kunstnerisk team.

🎨 Kunstnerisk team:
*  Theo Sundby – Koreograf & regissør
* Oda Øverjordet– Produsent & regissør
* Marius Mjelve Kristiansen – Produsent & regissør

Alle som melder seg på vil få svar, uansett utfall.

👉 Interessert? Meld deg på via linken under!
Del gjerne med noen som du synes burde søke!

• Spillealder 14–20 år

📍 Audition:
Onsdag 25. mars i Oslo
(Tidspunkt og eksakt adresse sendes til de som blir invitert.)

🎬 Om forestillingen
Dymphna utforsker temaer rundt mental helse og fortelles gjennom en kombinasjon av dans, monologer og fysisk scenearbeid.
Vi søker:
• 1 kvinnelig hovedrolle
• 2 mannlige hovedroller
• Ensemble (dansere og skuespillere)

Dette er en uhonorert produksjon, men gir verdifull sceneerfaring og tett samarbeid med et profesjonelt og engasjert kunstnerisk team.

🎨 Kunstnerisk team:
*  Theo Sundby – Koreograf & regissør
* Oda Øverjordet– Produsent & regissør
* Marius Mjelve Kristiansen – Produsent & regissør

Alle som melder seg på vil få svar, uansett utfall.

👉 Interessert? Meld deg på via linken under!
Del gjerne med noen som du synes burde søke!

items.text:
# *****CASTING CALL (SMALL PAY, BELFAST)*****

# **BLACK DOG**

*A troubled vigilante spends his nights patrolling the city streets and fighting criminals, all the while being haunted by visions of a black dog that push him towards self-destruction.*

**Short film** casting **four male supporting actors** to play a rag-tag gang of criminals for a pivotal **fight sequence** and recurring presence in the film.

***BIGMAN*** (40s to 50s)

The de facto leader. Calm, experienced, pragmatic. Carries authority within the group.

***GRUMBLE*** (20s to 40s)

Practical. Complains often, but gets the job done. Quick temper.

***LADYKILLER*** (20s to 30s)

Flashier, image-conscious, slightly cocky. Reacts emotionally when things turn violent.

***BABYFACE*** (20s to 30s)

Youngest energy of the group. Alert, anxious, reactive. Acts as a lookout during operations.

# **Fight scene required**
* All roles involve a choreographed, physical fight scene with the lead actor.
* Actors must be comfortable with staged violence, falling to the ground and staged injuries.
* Any experience in stage combat, stunt work, boxing, wrestling or physical theatre is welcome but not essential.
* All combat will be thoroughly rehearsed and choreographed to ensure on-set safety.

# **Production details**
* QUB film Master’s dissertation project.
* Small, token payment included.
* Travel covered and catering provided.
* **All experience levels welcome**.
* **Ages are flexible**.
* Filming in Belfast across several nights in late March/early April.

Contact us at:
# **daniel-bingham@hotmail.co.uk**

items.text:
CASTING CALL

We are casting for our comedy short film, ‘Flags’ (Working title) by Arash Sedighi and Ross Cawton.

‘Flags’ is a silly, farcical and absurd comedy of misunderstandings.

We are looking to cast the role of ‘Neighbour’. Description: Playing age 70 – 80, White/ European Descent.  Sweet, lovely, kind lady. Similar energy to Queen Elizabeth II. (Lancashire/ General Northern accent). Crucial role to the film as she has a big punchline at the end of the film.

A little bit about us. Arash Sedighi's latest short film 'Holding onto Home' was selected for the BAFTA/BIFA Qualifying Norwich Film Festival, BIFA Qualifying Spirit of Independence and BAFTA/BIFA Qualifying Manchester Film Festival. Ross Cawton's latest short film 'Do You Want To' was selected for the BAFTA Qualifying LOCO London Comedy Flim Festival, BIFA Qualifying Sunderland Shorts Film Festival, BIFA Qualifying KINO London Short Film Festival and more. The wonderful Oscar Garth will be the DOP for this film: [https://oscargarth.co.uk/](https://oscargarth.co.uk/)

We will be shooting in Burnley on Friday 6th March 2026. Talent must be available between 12pm and 4pm on this day. Talent must also be available for an online cast readthrough via Zoom in the evening on Thursday 5th March 2026. Talent must be local to Burnley, based in Lancashire or the North West.

Please note that this is a low/ no budget project. Talent will receive a small pay of £50 for the four hours, travel expenses and lunch will be provided. We will be submitting this film to festivals.

Talent must have previous comedy experience. If you would like to submit for the role. Please have a comedy showreel or have comedy clips to share.

If you would like to submit. Please send me a message with your work. Please submit before Wednesday 4th March 2026. If you know anyone who may be interested in this casting. Please share! It would be hugely appreciated! You must message us if you want to be considered.

Thank you so much for reading! We look forward to seeing your submissions! Good luck!

Ross :)

items.text:
*PAID OPPORTUNITY: CALLING DIRECTORS & DIRECTORS OF PHOTOGRAPHY (DOPs) for "Fires in the Heather" Proof of Concept*

We are seeking a visionary Director and a skilled  Director of Photography (DOP) for a paid opportunity to bring a pivotal scene or two from our new screenplay, “Fires in the Heather," to life.

**About the Project:**
"Fires in the Heather" is an evocative drama fantasy inspired by a compelling real story. Our goal is to produce a high-quality proof-of-concept piece (1-2 scenes) to showcase our artistic vision and secure investment for the full feature film. This is a unique opportunity to shape the foundational visual and narrative style of a truly impactful story.

Project Details:

Title: 
Fires in the Heather

Genre: 
Drama Fantasy (inspired by a real story)

Objective: 
Create 1-2 scenes for a proof-of-concept for potential investment.

Compensation: 
This is a paid position. Budget details are pending and will be discussed with shortlisted candidates.

Location:
Sussex area, UK. Candidates based in or able to work in this region are preferred.

Further Information:
You can learn more about the project at https://ohwafilm.com/one-pager/fires-in-the-heather/

Who We Are Looking For:

1. Director:
We seek an experienced Director with a strong visual style, a profound understanding of narrative storytelling, and a passion for drama fantasy. You should be adept at guiding performances and translating a screenplay into compelling cinematic sequences. Experience with proof-of-concept or short film production is beneficial.

2. Director of Photography (DOP):**
We are searching for a talented DOP with a keen eye for composition, lighting, and cinematic atmosphere. Your portfolio should demonstrate your ability to craft visually stunning images that enhance dramatic and fantastical elements. Experience working collaboratively with a director to achieve a cohesive vision is essential.

To Apply:
Interested Directors and DOPs are invited to submit their professional portfolios, showreels, and a brief statement outlining their interest in "Fires in the Heather."

Please send all submissions to our Producer:
Susan Rutledge
Email: susan@ohwafilm.com

Confidentiality:
A Non-Disclosure Agreement (NDA) will be digitally sent out to candidates whose portfolios align with our vision to facilitate the sharing of the full script and other relevant documentation.

Further Casting:
Please stay tuned for future casting announcements for actors and other crew roles.

We look forward to reviewing your work and potentially collaborating on "Fires in the Heather." Thank you for your interest.

- 4-5 High quality duet format videos, 8-10 photos, CV with personal information and contact details

items.text:
CASTING CALL – INDEPENDENT FEATURE FILM
Project Title: Between Closed Doors
Production Type: Independent Feature Film
Shoot Dates: March 13th – 15th
Location: Denver,  CO 
Compensation: $500/day + Reel + IMDb Credit

SYNOPSIS
Over the course of one night, strangers cross paths in a town preparing for change. Quiet conversations, withheld truths, and irreversible choices unfold in the spaces between what is said and what remains hidden proving that even brief encounters can leave lasting consequences.
NOW CASTING – LEAD & SUPPORTING ROLES

LEAD ROLES
Aaron (Male, 18–23)
Measured, introspective, and quietly intelligent. Carries a strong sense of responsibility that often isolates him from others. Struggles with choosing between personal ambition and loyalty to those who depend on him.

Nina (Female, 18–24)
Calm, observant, and emotionally disciplined. Appears self-assured, but avoids vulnerability by maintaining control. Highly perceptive of others’ motives, yet hesitant to confront her own emotional truths.

Brielle (Female, 19–25)
Bold, expressive, and confrontational when cornered. Lives impulsively, masking fear with confidence and wit. Beneath her tough exterior is a deep longing for stability she doesn’t know how to ask for.

SUPPORTING ROLES

Ivy (Female, 18–23)
Soft-spoken and reflective. Often underestimated due to her quiet nature, but possesses emotional insight and moral clarity that influence the choices of those around her.

Mr. Lowell (Male or Female, 30s–40s)
Grounded, patient, and thoughtful. A natural listener who offers guidance without imposing judgment. Carries unresolved feelings about missed chances and unspoken truths from earlier in life.

TO SUBMIT
Please email the following materials to iconmediafilm@gmail.com 
Current headshot
Acting résumé or demo reel (if available)
Role(s) you’re submitting for
City of residence

items.text:
The Lone Tree Arts Center is seeking LOCAL actors of all ethnicities for the heartfelt, funny, and music-filled true story of friendship at the center of ALWAYS… PATSY CLINE. 

This is an Equity LOA production, but non-Equity actors will be considered.

About the show: 
Before her voice became legendary, Patsy Cline formed an unexpected bond with a devoted Texas fan, Louise Seger, after a chance meeting in a honky-tonk. What began as admiration grew into a lasting friendship built on letters, laughter, and a shared love of country music. Featuring over two dozen of Patsy Cline’s greatest hits, including “Crazy,” “Walkin’ After Midnight,” and “I Fall to Pieces,” this uplifting musical celebrates loyalty, resilience, and the enduring power of one unforgettable voice.

Casting: 2 Principal Roles, 2 Understudy Roles. Role descriptions are available on our website: https://www.lonetreeartscenter.org/always-patsy-cline-auditions

Audition Dates and Times:

Monday, March 16, 2026

10:00 AM – 6:00 PM Principal Auditions (EPA)

Scheduling for Equity Actors opens on February 25th. Scheduling for Non-Equity Actors opens on March 5th. An auxiliary cord and an accompanist will be provided.

Callbacks:

Monday, April 6, 2026

9:00 A.M. - 3:00 P.M.

Personnel at Auditions:

Director – Kelly Van Oosbree

Executive Director – Leigh Chandler

Casting Director – Sylvia Gregory CSA

Music Director – Alec Steinhorn

Minimum Salaries:

$975 principal roles

$900 understudy roles

Important Production Dates:

First Rehearsal: 9/15/26

First Tech Rehearsal: 9/27/26

Invited Dress Rehearsal: 10/7/26

Opening Night: 10/8/26

Closing Night: 10/25/26

Materials and audition forms can be submitted online at https://www.lonetreeartscenter.org/always-patsy-cline-auditions

Questions? Contact Saundra Bergman at Saundra.Bergman@cityoflonetree.com or by phone at 720-509-1022.

items.text:
Hi FIND-ers! The Women in Film and Media Colorado annual Industry Fair is this weekend! We are celebrating our 10 year anniversary this year and things are bigger and better than ever! Lunch is included with your ticket each day! Link in the comments to get your tickets. If Cost is an issue, please reach out and we can figure something out!

Opening Night   | February 27 | 7 pm 

Start the Industry Fair the best way possible— with a drink in hand and a room full of filmmakers ready to connect. Join us for the Opening Night Cocktail Party at [Cabin House Studios](https://www.cabinhousestudios.com/), featuring powerhouse Miranda Bailey in conversation—a candid, energizing chat packed with real-world insight and creative momentum.

Day 1 | February 28 | 9am - 6pm

Community College of Aurora
9075 E Lowry Blvd, Denver, CO 80230

Dive into developing and marketing a vertical/web series, sharpen your interview looks with Mary Jeanes & Cheshire Li or learn insider tips on freelancing from Shawna Schultz.   Prefer hands-on storytelling? Jump into a two-part scene lab or catch a directing workshop with a Hollywood director Sarah Adina Smith. Spend the afternoon discovering the ins and outs of festivals with Eileen O'Brien, learn about Colorado’s refundable tax credit or check out the detailed craft of special effects makeup with Stephanie Lane and Michelle Knoebel. Wrap the day with industry insights on the director/casting director relationship with Nell Teare and Jamie Castro and a final panel on "Breaking IN: How did you do that?

Day 2 | March 1 | 9am - 6pm

Learn the *Principles of Film Adaptation with *Trai Cartwright, *Audition Techniques from a TV & Film Casting Director with Jamie Castro Casting* or jump into hands-on sessions like *Scene Lab Day 2*. The afternoon keeps the momentum going with a short documentary session with Jenna Red, filmmaking career strategy with Roe Moore, *Best Practices for Auditions & Callbacks with Intimacy* and everyone’s favorite stunts workshop with Sara Salazar & friends.

PASSES ON SALE NOW! www.wifmco.org/industry-fai-2026 2026 COMMUNITY COLLEGE of AURORA cabin house #개체하의'

items.text:
👋 Hallo zusammen,

ich bin **Existenzgründungsberater** und unterstütze Menschen dabei, **strukturiert und gefördert in die Selbstständigkeit** zu starten – je nach Situation z. B. über den **Gründungszuschuss der Agentur für Arbeit** oder über passende Fördermöglichkeiten im Zusammenhang mit dem **Jobcenter**.

Warum ich hier poste:
In vielen Gruppen rund um Selbstständigkeit sehe ich, dass viele mit einer guten Idee starten wollen, aber oft an denselben Punkten hängen:
* **Welche Förderung kommt überhaupt infrage?**
* **Welche Voraussetzungen müssen erfüllt sein?**
* **Wie gehe ich den Antrag richtig an?**
* **Wo fange ich am besten an, ohne Zeit zu verlieren?**

Genau dabei unterstütze ich.
Mein Fokus:

✅ Klarheit über Fördermöglichkeiten (Agentur für Arbeit / Jobcenter)
✅ Strukturierter Start in die Selbstständigkeit
✅ Unterstützung bei der Vorbereitung von Förderanträgen
✅ Orientierung zu Voraussetzungen, Ablauf und nächsten Schritten
Dein Vorteil (kurz auf den Punkt):

➡️ **mehr Klarheit** statt Informationschaos
➡️ **weniger Fehler** bei Vorbereitung und Antrag
➡️ **mehr Sicherheit** beim Start in die Selbstständigkeit
➡️ **schneller ins Handeln kommen** mit einem klaren Plan

Wenn du gerade über den Schritt in die Selbstständigkeit nachdenkst oder bereits gestartet bist und wissen möchtest, welche Möglichkeiten es für deinen Fall gibt, kannst du mir gern eine **PN** schreiben.
Auch Gruppenadmins oder Unternehmer:innen, die das Thema für ihre Community interessant finden, dürfen sich gerne melden. 🤝

Viele Grüße

items.text:
NYT OPSLAG

Til tv-serien De Bedste Familier (til DR) søges 

Få ledige mandlige statistroller i alder 25-50 år til statistrolle som funktionær til en fest i en togvogn Mariager-Handest, MEN med kostume/sminke dag i Skovlunde på Sjælland d. onsdag d. 4/3 et aftalt tidsrum ml. 9.30 - 15.30 (pause 11.30-13.15)

Der er kun en plads tirsdag eftermiddag og en torsdag formiddag ledig.

Se krav nederst fra Sminke og Kostume pga. perioden 1950-60erne samt tilgængelige kostumer på lager fra den periode.
Du skal ramme indenfor skiven ;-) 

FRA JYLLAND (ELLER FYN):
Produktionen dækker transport til kostume/sminkeprøven på en af disse måder
1. Bro og benzin fra bopæl til Skovlunde og retur. Alternativt en lavpris færgeovergang t/r tilsvarende prisen for broafgift.
2. En lavpris bus- eller togbillet. Der kører offentlige bus fra Skovlunde st. til adressen i Mileparken.
Der er gratis anvist parkering hos Filmgear Mileparken.
Udgifter til f.eks. transport på optagelsesdagene dækkes ikke.
Evt. overnatninger dækkes ikke.
Derudover er der et personligt honorar for kostume/sminkedagen samt et tilpasset antal optagedage. Se nedenfor

Du skal kunne være med til begge optagelsesdagene
16/3 ca. 15 - 02.30 og igen 17/3 ca. kl. 11 - 22.30 til en fest i Handest. 

Der er i alt til hver 2400 kr. honorar for 2 optagelsesdage og 1 sminke/kostumeprøve. Det er inkl. transporttiden.
Der er forplejning tilpasset tidsrum på optagelsesdage.

Følgende krav til krop og udseende pga. tilgængelige kostumer og tidsperioden:

NB! Danmark var ikke så beriget med forskellige nationaliteter, så du skal ligne en med dansk/nordeuropæisk herkomst.

MÆND:
max højde 186, tøjstr. S-L (der er ingen kostume i XL eller over), ingen synlige tatoveringer med skjorte/bukser på eller piercinger, hårfarve skal være naturlig og ensfarvet med mindre gråt, hårlængde min. ca. 8 cm så der kan laves sideskilning, ingen kronraget eller karseklippet, ingen skæg, du skal kunne se uden briller.

Vi skal kende følgende for at komme i betragtning, som skal sendes i en mail til ajlystbaek@hotmail.com

Navn, alder, mobilnummer, højde, tøjstr., skostr., mål: hoved-hals-bryst-talje-hofte og inseam/outseam.

Der skal være to helt nye billeder: vellignende billede i helfigur samt et selfie, hvor hår og ansigt ses tydeligt.

Oplys hvad du forventer af pris for transport til/fra Skovlunde på kostume/sminkedagen.

items.text:
skuespillere søges
Hej, vi er en gruppe unge fra filmskolen, Station Next, der er i gang med at producere en kortfilm, og vi søger derfor en dreng og en pige i alderen 15–19 år til frivillige skuespillerroller.

 

Vi leder efter nogen, der har lyst til at tage opgaven seriøst og engagere sig i projektet. Det er en fordel, hvis du har erfaring med skuespil, men det er ikke et krav, det vigtigste er, at du har mod på at prøve og lyst til at være med.

Optagelserne forventes at finde sted i Odder i weekenden den 28.–29. marts.

Hvis det lyder som noget for dig, eller en du kender, så send meget gerne en kort video til min mail, hvor du fortæller lidt om dig selv, f.eks. om du har erfaring med skuespil, og hvad du laver i din fritid.

Du kan kontakte mig her:

Mail: livalinneberg14@gmail.com

Vi glæder os til at høre fra jer! 🎬

items.text:
PROJECT TITLE: When The Bell Rings
PROJECT TYPE: Student-Led Psychological Horror Short Film

LOCATION: Winchester / Andover, Hampshire, UK

SHOOT DATES: 23/03/2026 – 05/04/2026

(Exact shoot days & call times will vary depending on role.)

AUDITION DEADLINE: 07/03/2026

⸻

PROJECT DESCRIPTION:

When The Bell Rings is a psychological horror short exploring identity, vulnerability, and the dangerous pull of belonging. The story follows a group of young adults drawn into a mysterious cult led by a powerful and unsettling figure.

This is a student-led project and a great opportunity for actors looking to gain on-set experience and footage for their showreel.

All ethnicities and backgrounds are encouraged to apply. Visual references are tonal only and not reflective of required physical appearance.

⸻

ROLES AVAILABLE:

• ALEX (Male, 19–25) – Protagonist. Shy, introspective, emotionally vulnerable.

• KENNEDY (Female, 19–25) – Emotional anchor. Quiet, secretive, internally conflicted.

• SAM (Female, 19–25) – Voice of reason. Grounded, assertive, morally driven.

• RODRICK (Male, 19–25) – Best friend. Confident, laid back, loyal.

• IRIS (Female, 19–25) – Geeky, witty, emotionally reactive.

• BEN (Male, 19–25) – Comedic relief. Relaxed, impulsive.

• PRINCIPLE (Female, 40–65) – Antagonist. Controlled, commanding, authoritative presence.

• CULT TEACHER (Any gender, 30+) – Small speaking role (1 line).

• CULT MEMBERS (Any gender, 18+) – Background roles (some with lines).

You may apply for multiple roles.

⸻

PAYMENT: Unpaid (Student Production)

EXPENSES: Food provided. Travel expenses covered (with receipt).

⸻

CONTACT DETAILS:

Production Team – When The Bell Rings

Email: whenthebellringsshortfilm@gmail.com

Instagram: @when_the_bell_rings

Please email or DM with your headshot, playing age, location, character and any relevant showreel/Spotlight link.

items.text:
CASTING CALL – LONDON
Paid | Self-Funded Coming-of-Age Short Film
Seeking 2 Young Actors (Ages 16–20)
1 Male
1 Female
All races, backgrounds and sexualities welcome

No professional acting experience is required. We welcome both new and experienced performers — authenticity, emotional openness and a willingness to explore vulnerable material are what matter most.

This short film explores the confusing, embarrassing and often uncomfortable space between childhood and adulthood. It centres on a young couple (playing ages 14–16) caught in that in-between stage — desperate to feel grown, yet still surrounded by glitter-covered bedroom walls and the remains of childhood.
The story captures exaggerated, half-true conversations about sex, red spots on foreheads, bra straps hanging over vest tops as quiet markers of newfound womanhood, and boys beginning to see girls less as friends and more as something to strive toward. It examines the awkward performance of maturity — wanting to feel adult, sensual and independent while your body, confidence and environment have not yet caught up. The tone is tender, edgy and uncomfortably honest.

Inspired by Palo Alto and Me and Earl and the Dying Girl, the film combines naturalistic performances with a stylised yet grounded portrayal of youth and vulnerability.

Requirements:
Must believably play 14–16, No visible tattoos, no non-removable piercings (ears and one nose piercing acceptable.) Comfortable with narration and mildly explicit teenage themes, Able to travel to London locations
Paid (low day rate – self-funded student production)

About the Director:
My name is Molly Sheridan and I am a final-year Film student at Central Saint Martins. My work focuses on youth, identity and the subtle emotional shifts that define formative years. I am particularly drawn to stories that sit in uncomfortable, transitional spaces — where characters are trying to become something new but are not quite there yet. This project marks my first larger-scale production, and I am building a collaborative team of emerging creatives. I am committed to creating a safe, open working environment where actors feel supported in delivering honest, vulnerable performances.

To apply, please send a headshot, your age and a few details about yourself. If you have a showreel, you are welcome to include that as well.

Contact: greenladyproduction05@gmail.com 
If you have any questions or would like more information, please do not hesitate to get in contact. Scripts and relevant production documents will be sent directly to selected applicants following initial conversations.

topComments.text: I’m interested! Should I send the information here or to the email provided?

items.text:
# *****CASTING CALL (SMALL PAY, BELFAST)*****

# **BLACK DOG**

*A troubled vigilante spends his nights patrolling the city streets and fighting criminals, all the while being haunted by visions of a black dog that push him towards self-destruction.*

**Short film** casting **four male supporting actors** to play a rag-tag gang of criminals for a pivotal **fight sequence** and recurring presence in the film.

***BIGMAN*** (40s to 50s)

The de facto leader. Calm, experienced, pragmatic. Carries authority within the group.

***GRUMBLE*** (20s to 40s)

Practical. Complains often, but gets the job done. Quick temper.

***LADYKILLER*** (20s to 30s)

Flashier, image-conscious, slightly cocky. Reacts emotionally when things turn violent.

***BABYFACE*** (20s to 30s)

Youngest energy of the group. Alert, anxious, reactive. Acts as a lookout during operations.

# **Fight scene required**
* All roles involve a choreographed, physical fight scene with the lead actor.
* Actors must be comfortable with staged violence, falling to the ground and staged injuries.
* Any experience in stage combat, stunt work, boxing, wrestling or physical theatre is welcome but not essential.
* All combat will be thoroughly rehearsed and choreographed to ensure on-set safety.

# **Production details**
* QUB film Master’s dissertation project.
* Small, token payment included.
* Travel covered and catering provided.
* **All experience levels welcome**.
* **Ages are flexible**.
* Filming in Belfast across several nights in late March/early April.

Contact us at:
# **daniel-bingham@hotmail.co.uk**

items.text:
**🎬 CASTING CALL – No-Budget Comedy Spot (Manga-Style)**

**Arbeitstitel:** „Das Pizza-Finale“
**Drehort:** Köln
**Drehtermin:** 07.03.2026 (Samstag)
**Uhrzeit:** 14 Uhr
**Format:** Werbespot im Manga-/Anime-Stil
**Genre:** Comedy, situative Rivalität

Für einen humorvollen Werbespot suchen wir drei spielfreudige Darsteller:innen aus Köln mit starkem mimischem Ausdruck und sehr gutem Gespür für Timing.

Die Szene lebt von intensiven Blicken, inneren Monologen (V.O.) und überzeichneter „Battle“-Dramatik im Manga-Stil. Gesucht werden Persönlichkeiten, die Alltagssituationen mit epischer Ernsthaftigkeit spielen können.

**Logline:**

Ein harmloses Pizzaessen eskaliert komödiantisch zu einem stillen Wettkampf um das letzte Stück.

**🍕 JOHAN**

**Spielalter:** 20–35
**Typ:** Ehrgeiziger, leicht überambitionierter Typ mit Comedy-Talent
**Aussehen:** Blond, schlank, leicht nerdiger Look, kurze Haare, europäischer Typ. Gern Brillenträger.

**Charakter:**
Johan nimmt harmlose Situationen viel zu ernst. In seinem Kopf wird das letzte Pizzastück zum epischen Endkampf. Er ist analytisch, kompetitiv – aber auf sympathische, leicht überdrehte Weise.

**Anforderung:**
Starke Mimik (intensive Close-ups), gutes Timing für Voice-Over-Texte, körperliche Comedy (Speed-Eating, Blickduell).

**🍕 MARIO**

**Spielalter:** 30–45
**Typ:** Selbstbewusster, ruhiger Gegenspieler mit natürlicher Autorität
**Aussehen:** Kräftige oder leicht muskulöse Statur, schwarze Haare, asiatischer Typ

**Charakter:**
Mario ist der gelassene Stratege. Er sagt wenig, kommentiert aber innerlich alles im Voice-Over. Sein Humor ist trocken, sein Blick maximal ernst – zumindest in seiner eigenen Vorstellung.

**Anforderung:**
Starke Präsenz, subtile Komik, intensiver Blickkontakt. Fähigkeit, Überdramatisierung mit absoluter Ernsthaftigkeit zu spielen.

**🍕 KERSTIN**

**Spielalter:** 25–40
**Typ:** Smart, ruhig, fashion-bewusst – mit starkem Comedy-Instinkt
**Aussehen:** Schlank, eher klein, stilvoller Look, braune Haare; europäischer oder südamerikanischer Typ

**Charakter:**
Während die beiden Männer sich in ihrem inneren Endkampf verlieren, beobachtet Kerstin alles entspannt – nur um im perfekten Moment das letzte Stück zu nehmen. Sie ist die stille Siegerin.

**Anforderung:**
Natürliches Spiel, feines Timing, selbstbewusste Ausstrahlung. Der Humor entsteht aus ihrer Gelassenheit.

Einen Eindruck unserer bisherigen Arbeiten findet Ihr unter:
https://www.visuzfilms.com/

Das Projekt wird ohne Budget umgesetzt. Eine Vergütung sowie die Übernahme von Fahrt- oder Unterkunftskosten sind daher leider nicht möglich.

Wir bieten jedoch ein engagiertes Team, kreative Zusammenarbeit und hochwertiges Material für das eigene Showreel.

Für Verpflegung am Set ist selbstverständlich gesorgt – inklusive Pizza 🍕

 

**📩 Bewerbung & Kontakt**

Bitte sendet eure Bewerbung mit:
* aktuellem Foto
* Showreel (falls vorhanden)
* Instagram / facebook (falls vorhanden)

an:
**E-Mail: visuzfilms@gmail.com**
Betreff: *Casting „Das Pizza-Finale“ – Rollenname*

Wir freuen uns auf eure Bewerbungen!

sharedPost.text:
Casting : "Maybe its love, maybe not"

I am Thomas Goersch from Stuttgart Germany. 
Actor and Filmdirector. 
I am making Independent Movies.
I present my movies on International Film festivals and was lucky to receive some awards. 
But the work is not about awards and money, its about making movies for the people to think about.
My next movie is a modern love story:
An elderly man is meeting another younger, very attractive man in the Internet.  But they are from different Continents. They start a long distance relastionship ship. which is full of passion and desire. 
One day the younger man starts to ask for money, cause he is a Student and no more able to pay his bills. 
The older man is full of distrust.
Is he only there  to pay his lovers bills or is there love between them ?
A story with two endings.
One with true love and one with only cheating. Based on a real story.
I am looking for the young attraktive Lover.
Men  25 to 36 years old,  good looking  who is able to film his parts on his own by smartshone
I am always open and honest. You can earn no money on this. but maybe there is a good film in the end promoting for you.
I guess its not necessary that an educated actor is playing this part. so feel free to get in touch
Thats me 
www.imdb.com/name/nm1591928
Get in touch under Thomas.Goersch@vodafonemail.de 
please ask for details.

items.text:
Why was Mike Lambert **blacklisted** from the **Jackie Chan Stunt Team**? 🎬🚫

Mike reveals the shocking true story of why his one-on-one fight with **Jackie Chan** in the film "Who Am I?" never happened.

This is a raw look at the dark side of 90s **Hong Kong Cinema**:

💰 **The Salary Scam:** How a middleman allegedly stole Mike’s pay behind Jackie's back.

🚁 **The Lost Fight:** Mike describes the epic climax in Rotterdam that was scrapped.

🤐 **The Silent Treatment:** What it’s like to be "sent to Coventry" and ignored by the team.

Whether you're a fan of **Martial Arts Cinema** or a performer, this is a massive lesson in the business of stunts. 🚀

📺 **WATCH THE FULL STORY HERE:**[https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ADkYs0__K00](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ADkYs0__K00)

#JackieChan #Stunts #WhoAmI #MovieMartialArts

Excited for March classes! I have two rare spots open in my Advanced On-Camera for March! And a couple of spots still in Michael Druck's TV/Film class, and a couple in each of our VO classes! All other classes are sold out for the month, but we'd love to have you for On-Camera or VO in the classes above! Classes are $250 for the month, which breaks down to about $62/class. They're capped at 10 people. 

To register, email me at SarahDowlingCasting@gmail.com and put March Classes in the subject line! You can find out more about the classes here: [www.sarahdowlingcasting.com/actors](https://l.facebook.com/l.php?u=http%3A%2F%2Fwww.sarahdowlingcasting.com%2Factors%3Ffbclid%3DIwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExM2xRMVA5Z1lvQkdkVGlWdHNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR6tshwKeXC1fs5xAuZIvXgH3FdLiGbkc7iyc764K3rcdJnsjwiOoLdpj7TfdA_aem_HIkBCPo2sLQ0LlmUih_ESw&h=AT6192DIqSfw9JcxmHl-ZnRsElDahIKnws2Xie7qtuTrjrkn5gZBYIt9nqdvls21MlwrLUsWCL0rXD-tIq-cGF4CvZUBL38eOdF5wfTofWUO_Wl2NT7uGTX3CvlZA7RTc91GvobSwozA7R4ygNWughMi-oRUi0NmuqY&__tn__=-UK-R&c[0]=AT5oA39B-gaH2kLUxbN9ZWwnD9lB6PHancClpuXiK5QhhaFnpz_NiXF2XEkyptiPbY17bxyzSeuq9ap1MMJvu_Uq4hs4K9_rMUjR_1PEVWgls-9X_MbeXH0KCUf6Z-MTFDNhQGm-ZWwJz5WrlRp7WPZjlYB5bXbM5DIlOHz5wjr0nz71y2bIH_IO-eyb-jAAy8COp4YdGxWyUW5yqcwLAhu2od8)

items.text:
URGENT CASTING – INDIO, CA 

Coachella W1, W2 + Stagecoach 

**Event Name:** Major Makeup Brand @ Coachella & Stagecoach

**Location:** Empire Polo Fields, Indio, CA 92201

** Dates:**

• April 10–12 (Weekend 1)

• April 17–19 (Weekend 2)

• April 24–26 (Stagecoach)

** Schedule:**

• April 10: 11:30AM – 8:30PM

• All other days: 12:30PM – 8:30PM

 ***Must be fully available for ALL three weekends (all event days + scheduled hours). No exceptions.

** Role:** Brand Ambassadors (makeup enthusiasts a plus!)

**Responsibilities include:**

• Managing line queue

• Assisting with photo moments

• Relaying product knowledge

• Directional support & guest engagement

**Rate:** $50 per hr 

**Per Diem:** $50/day for F&B ($450 total across program)

** Required:**

• Must be comfortable in a shared house setting (shared bedroom + bathroom with team members)

• Positive, professional, team-oriented energy

• Thrive in high-energy festival environments

• Due to the scale & continuity of this program, cancellations after confirmation may impact eligibility for future bookings with She So Co

** TO APPLY:**

DM @SheSoCorporate on Instagram with:

• Full Name

• Email

• Phone Number

• Past Brand Ambassador / Door Experience

• Headshot

Festival-ready, reliable, and high-energy talent only

• Due to the scale & continuity of this program, cancellations after confirmation may impact eligibility for future bookings with She So Co

• Full Name

• Phone Number

• Headshot

Festival-ready, reliable, and high-energy talent only

items.text:
Servus zusammen 🙂

ich möchte euch einen kleinen Einblick in ein freies Filmprojekt geben, das überwiegend mit **engagierten Komparsen und Laiendarstellern** entstanden ist.

Viele, die sonst im Hintergrund stehen, haben hier größere Rollen übernommen — und genau das macht für mich den Reiz solcher Projekte aus. Mit wenig Budget, viel Improvisation und echter Spielfreude ist ein Film entstanden, der vor allem vom Teamgeist lebt.

Ein großes Dankeschön an alle Mitwirkenden — ohne euch gäbe es solche Projekte nicht.

Wer mag, kann gerne mal reinschauen 🙂

Wir sind auf YouTube. „Familie Brandl Comedy“ hier der Link.
👉 https://youtu.be/ndAtSQOVREY?si=9vq-k4j9bFdRwume

Casting zdalny do kolejnego odcinka ,,Na ratunek 112'' do którego zdjęcia odbędą się we Wrocławiu w terminach od 9.03 do 11.03
Dam rolę na poszczególne postacie:

 

1. Majka Frączak - 17 lat. Terminy zdjęć 9.03, 10.03

2. Iza Matysiak – 17 lat. Terminy zdjęć 9.03, 10.03

3. Janek Lubicki – 17 lat. Terminy zdjęć 9.03, 10.03

4. Halina Frączak – 45 lat. Terminy zdjęć 9.03 

5. Dziewczyna – 17 lat. Terminy zdjęć 10.03 (Tylko osoby z Wrocławia lub okolic)

6. Ratownik 1, Ratownik 2. Terminy zdjęć 9.03

7.Marek Urbaniak-26 lat. Terminy zdjęć 10.03, 11.03

8.Ewa Zdanowicz-17 lat- Terminy zdjęć 10.03, 11.03

9.Milena Bergiel- 17 lat. Terminy zdjeć 10.03, 11.03

10.Agata Stefańczuk-17 lat. Terminy zdjęć 10.03, 11.03

11.Krystyna Zdanowicz-51 lat. Terminy zdjęć 11.03

12.Barbara Sołtysiak-70 lat. Terminy zdjęć 10.03

13.Ratownik. Terminy zdjęć 11.03

14.Policjant. Terminy zdjęć 11.03

Dla osób spoza Wrocławia poza wynagrodzeniem za role, bukuję hotel oraz zwracam za koszty transportu w jedna i druga stronę.

Wszystko płatne gotówką na planie po zakończeniu zdjęć.

Zainteresowane osoby proszę o koment. Pod postem.

SERIAL DOKUMENTALNY TRUE CRIME

WARSZAWA i okolice

28.02 / 1.03

140-170zł 

Do nowego serialu dokumentalnego w formule true crime poszukuję statystów wg poniższej rozpiski.

28.02/1.03 - kontynuacja, 170zł/dzień
* KLAUDEK - mężczyzna, max 175cm wzrostu, SZATYN/ciemne blond włosy, noszący okulary (mile widziane, nie konieczne)

28.02 - stawka 140zł
* PACIOR - mężczyzna, wysoki, łysy, wiek 30+

Zgłoszenia wysyłajcie na adres: patrycja@podtytulem.pl

W tytule: nazwa postaci

W treści: imię i nazwisko, wiek, nr telefonu, miejscowość oraz ZDJĘCIE TWARZY I SYLWETKI tylko z dnia zgłoszenia + ZDJĘCIE DŁONI (dłonie zadbane, paznokcie naturalne!).

Zgłoszenia bez zdjęcia dłoni nie będą brane pod uwagę.

*HASTER*

Vi har fået nogle afbud til optagelser i morgen, og vil derfor høre om der er nogen der har lyst til at være med på optagelser i morgen i KBH K.

Vi skal lave en brandfilm for dansk fodboldklub.

Optagelserne finder sted mellem kl. 11.30 og 16.00 i København K.

Man skal være over 21 år. 

Jobbet er lønnet med 500 DKK. 

Send gerne en mail med billede, alder og telefon nummer, hvis der interesseret - så vender jeg tilbage hvis det bliver aktuelt :) 

statist@baconcph.com

De bedste hilsner,
Nana
